bio: I'm a software developer and data analyst with experience across full-stack engineering, cloud infrastructure, and data science. I work up and down the stack — building React and Next.js applications backed by AWS, writing data pipelines in Python and PySpark, and designing systems that range from security tools to distributed analytics platforms.

When I am not coding, I enjoy fishing, hiking, and exploring the outdoors. I also have a passion for reading, particularly science fiction and fantasy novels. I find that immersing myself in different worlds through books helps fuel my creativity and problem-solving skills in software development.
